since_last: 34% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.62%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 34% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.42% · BTC -0.07% · Gold -0.67% · Nasdaq100 +0.33%. 34% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.62%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.62%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.49%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -5.95%
cards.body: Leaders: TTD +1.74%, NOW +1.39%, CRM +1.16%, PANW +1.03%, DDOG +0.99%. Laggards: MU -5.95%, AMBA -4.27%, KLAC -4.02%, AMAT -3.90%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.09% at $143.72
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.09% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
